economic_notes: Nation operates through seven reportable segments: band governance, education, infrastructure & facilities, retail operations, social assistance, health, and investments. Kitsaki Group (99.9% owned partnerships) reported total revenue of $43,862,945 and net income of $2,627,950 allocated to Nation. Nation has investments in Kitsaki Development Limited Partnership (99.9%), Kitsaki Management Limited Partnership (99.9%), KDC Management Corp (100%), and Lac La Ronge Wild Rice Corporation (23.2%). Woodlands Creek Enterprises Inc. (33.33%) provides financial assistance to post-secondary students. Nation operates waste management (30% share) and water distribution (91% share) regional corporations. Multiple retail operations including gas bars, lumber/furniture, supermarket, grocery stores.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 (not 2024 as template suggests). Auditor signed May 28, 2021 - significant delay. Text encoding in source document appears corrupted/scrambled making precise figure extraction difficult. The Nation has a complex structure with multiple reserves (La Ronge, Sucker River, Grandmother's Bay, Stanley Mission), proportionate consolidation of government partnerships (waste management 30%, water distribution 91%), and modified equity method for Kitsaki Group business entities. Ottawa Trust funds were transferred to the Nation during the year as the Nation enacted its own Land Code. All home ownership program loans are in default. Comparative year figures appear to be 2019. MNP LLP identified from context as auditor (Prince Albert, Saskatchewan office).
